exampleSentences: Cảnh sát đã tìm thấy vũ khí trong chiếc xe bị bỏ lại.
Anh không được phép mang vũ khí vào khu vực này.
Người lính phải học cách sử dụng vũ khí một cách an toàn.
notes:
Vũ khí means weapon — anything used to attack or defend (gun, knife, bomb, etc.).

It’s a noun. You can say một vũ khí, but people often use it in general statements without a classifier. Common pairings: sử dụng vũ khí (use a weapon), mang vũ khí (carry a weapon), buôn bán vũ khí (trade weapons), vũ khí hạt nhân (nuclear weapons).

It can be literal (physical weapons) or metaphorical, like something being your “weapon” in competition (skills, knowledge).

A more formal synonym is khí giới, but vũ khí is much more common.
notes_md:
**Vũ khí** means *weapon* — anything used to attack or defend (gun, knife, bomb, etc.).

It’s a noun. You can say **một vũ khí**, but people often use it in general statements without a classifier. Common pairings: **sử dụng vũ khí** (use a weapon), **mang vũ khí** (carry a weapon), **buôn bán vũ khí** (trade weapons), **vũ khí hạt nhân** (nuclear weapons).

It can be literal (physical weapons) or metaphorical, like something being your “weapon” in competition (skills, knowledge).

A more formal synonym is **khí giới**, but **vũ khí** is much more common.
exampleSentencesTranslated: The police found a weapon in the abandoned car.
You are not allowed to bring a weapon into this area.
The soldier must learn how to use a weapon safely.
